title: Cheese and Crumble American Pie
description: A classic American dessert featuring a crumbly crust and melted cheese.
instructions: 2. Roll out the pastry crust and place in a pie dish.
3. In a bowl, mix the American cheese and curd cheese until smooth.
4. Add the sour crumble to the cheese mixture and mix until combined.
5. Pour the cheese mixture into the pie crust.
6. In a separate bowl, beat the egg and mix with the confectioners sugar until smooth.
7. Brush the egg mixture over the crust to prevent burning.
8. Bake the pie for 35-40 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
9. Remove the pie from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes.
